supported_devices: Gavita e-Series fixtures: up to 80 single-bus or 1000 repeater-bus across 2 channels; auxiliary equipment via ECM module switching; expandable to 1200 fixtures with B200 booster
port_types: 2x RJ9 (4P4C) (main + aux), 2x 3.5mm probe jack (T1 + T2), cage clamp ECM1, cage clamp ECM2, cage clamp alarm NO, cage clamp alarm NC, 15V DC power input
compatible_lights: Gavita e-Series, Digistar e-Series, Pro Line e-Series Slim, CMH e-Series, Gavita LEDs
compatible_sensors: Gavita temperature sensor (3.5mm jack); 2 sensors supported for dual-room
compatible_humidifiers: Any 120/240V equipment via ECM module relay switching (indirect, not closed-loop control)
compatible_co2_equipment: Any CO2 equipment via ECM module relay switching (indirect, not closed-loop control)
supported_manufacturer_series: e-Series, Digistar e-Series, Pro Line e-Series Slim, CMH e-Series, LED series
recommended_use_note: Dual grow room (independent 12/12 Inverse mode) or large single room (Follow mode) with up to 80 fixtures single-bus or 1000 repeater-bus; alarm contacts for external alarm integration
uvp_notes: Consistent 399€ at Lichtblick Frankfurt and 399.90€ at Growberg; cross-retailer consistency increases confidence
notes: Gen 2 (906121); dimensions 110x21x65mm and 115g from official manual; 15V DC adapter; anodized aluminum extrusion housing; dual channel; Follow mode (single room) and Inverse mode (independent 12/12 light cycles); per-channel independent sunrise/sunset new in Gen 2; non-volatile event logging; light dimming 50–115%; expandable with Gavita Booster B200 up to 1200 fixtures; ECM connections for auxiliary equipment switching
